summary: Expose restore progress via metrics exporter
description: Gap noted on the metrics and observability architecture page: restore only reports start and completion today, nothing incremental. On a large cluster restore that takes several minutes, on-call has no visibility into whether it is progressing or stuck.

comments.author: Priya Natarajan
comments.body: Can emit a sample from RestoreCoordinator each time a shard finishes warming, using record() in src/metrics/stats.ts, tagged with jobId and shard count so far.

comments.author: Elena Petrova
comments.body: Added a shards-warmed gauge sampled per shard completion and wired it into the shared dashboard. On-call can now watch a restore progress in near real time instead of guessing. Resolving.
